description: Individual rat identifier reconstructed from source files.
Session or test label standardized across experiments.
Start time of 5-second bin in seconds.
End time of 5-second bin in seconds.
Number of 22-kHz ultrasonic vocalization calls in this 5-second bin. Event-derived; 0 means recorded/no event.
Number of 50-kHz ultrasonic vocalization calls in this 5-second bin. Event-derived; 0 means recorded/no event.
Integer lever-press count reconstructed from Graphic State Notation CSV event logs. Event-derived; 0 means recorded/no press.
FreezeFrame-derived percent freezing for this 5-second bin. Dense time-series; 0 means 0% freezing, NaN means missing/not recorded.
Session-level fecal boli count when structured logs are available; primarily Study 2. Use as external validation/covariate, not primary 5-s emission.
Whether USV modality was recorded for the subject-session.
Whether lever modality was recorded for the subject-session.
Whether freezing modality was recorded for the subject-session.
Whether structured boli value is available for the subject-session.
Group label inferred from source metadata when available.
Context metadata inferred from session/protocol; use cautiously for modeling.
Stimulus type metadata inferred from session/protocol; use cautiously for modeling.
Original availability flag retained from reconstruction pipeline.
Recalculated flag: TRUE iff USV22, USV50, lever, and freezing are all non-missing in the row. This is the primary complete-case indicator for four-channel HMM analyses.
